author: doll-agent
content: Change FromArrow::into_ferray(self) → to_ferray(&self) since the impl always copies. Same for FromArrowBool. Old method signature kept as a deprecated default-impl forwarder to avoid breaking downstream callers immediately. Update inline tests + the new f16 roundtrip + 2 new tests proving the borrow form lets callers reuse the Arrow array after conversion.
